title: Evacuations in Guam as super typhoon Bavi approaches
description: The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.
content:
Emergency evacuations are taking place in Guam and the Northern Mariana Islands as a super typhoon bears down on the US Pacific territories.
Bavi is forecast to make landfall early on Monday morning… [+1295 chars]
de: Evakuierungen in Guam, da sich der Supertaifun Bavi nähert. Es wird erwartet, dass der Sturm Windgeschwindigkeiten von über 160 Meilen pro Stunde und fast 11 Meter hohe Wellen mit sich bringt, wenn er am Montag auf Land trifft.
en: Evacuations in Guam as super typhoon Bavi approaches. The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.
la: Vacationes in Guam sicut super typhonium Bavi accedit. Tempestas praenuntiat ut ventos in excessu 160mphorum et fluctuum 11m altam fere ferant cum lapsus die Lunae facit.

title: Strengthening El Niño Suppressing Tropical Development, Officially Puts Atlantic Hurricane Season Behind Schedule
description: The first month of the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season has come to an end, and so far, there's only been the development of one tropical storm.
content: The first month of the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season has come to an end, and so far, there’s only been the development of one tropical storm. According to FOX Weather, this officially puts the seaso… [+1478 chars]
de: Durch die Verstärkung von El Niño wird die tropische Entwicklung unterdrückt, wodurch die Hurrikansaison im Atlantik offiziell hinter dem Zeitplan zurückbleibt. Der erste Monat der atlantischen Hurrikansaison 2026 ist zu Ende und bisher hat sich nur ein einziger Tropensturm entwickelt.
en: Strengthening El Niño Suppressing Tropical Development, Officially Puts Atlantic Hurricane Season Behind Schedule. The first month of the 2026 Atlantic hurricane season has come to an end, and so far, there's only been the development of one tropical storm.
la: Confortans El Niño Development Tropical omni- bus, Officialiter Ponit Atlanticum Procellae Season Post Schedulam. Primus mensis anni 2026 Atlantici tempestatis tempore finitur, et tantum tantum unius tempestatis tropicae fuit progressio.
